examples: Long system prompts or reusable examples can become cache candidates when the model and region support the preview.
detail.new_accounting: Supported repeated prompt content can be cached and reused across calls, changing effective prompt-processing cost and latency.
detail.old_accounting: Repeated prompt content was processed without Bedrock prompt-cache reuse.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official provider page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: provider-announced preview savings for supported repeated prompts

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate repeated system prompts and retrieval prefixes for supported Bedrock models before assuming cost reductions in production forecasts.
Verify model, region, and account eligibility before adding cache-dependent request paths.

limitations: Preview availability was limited at launch; eligibility can vary by model, region, and account.
summary: AWS announced a preview of Amazon Bedrock prompt caching, allowing supported models and regions to reuse repeated prompt content and change token-processing cost behavior.
title: Amazon Bedrock Adds Prompt Caching Preview
